items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
😐 turns 🙂, CE Smile Bag returns with a fresh look!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LUGGAGE New Smile Bag
The classic of memory returns with a new look!
👜Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a minimalist and chic modern temperament.
At the 2026 Spring debut, Creative Director Michael Rider brought the "Smile Bag" back with a surprise.
Smooth and lustrous leather, saddle stitching and piping create a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette.
The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag".
By reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123693
Color: Black
Dimensions: Base 36x22x16cm
Opening 56cm

items.name_en: LOUISE Small Smooth Calfskin Handbag 24s New Louise Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
LOUISE Small Smooth Calfskin Handbag 24s New Louise Bucket Bag
Calling all the besties who previously planted a seed for the 16 bucket bag📣
This year's Louise lock adds an Arc de Triomphe element
Enhances the recognition of this bucket bag, making it more fashionable and exquisite
Meets hand-carry/crossbody/shoulder needs with a very considerable capacity
Completely stress-free for daily commute/business trips/office 👏
Besties who like it can buy with confidence~
Leather flap with TRIOMPHE magnetic snap
1 main compartment
1 leather top handle, 3 inches (7 cm) long
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 19 inches (48 cm), max length 21 inches (53.5 cm)
Dimensions 6 X 7 X 5 inches (16 X 19 X 12 cm)
Item No.: 119173

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
New Arc de Triomphe pouch, full of sophistication!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is the steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram, etc... all exude incomparable sophistication ❤️ The Kelly classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, showing aesthetic charm immediately 🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113
Size: 20.5x13x8 (with original packaging)
